title: complex32 normalization hits AccumulateType internal assert

source.document: 基于大语言模型的深度学习库模糊测试.pdf
source.section: 附录 缺陷触发代码示例

trigger: Use complex32 tensors with normalization APIs.
expected: PyTorch should either support the dtype or reject it with a normal Python-level exception.
observed: PyTorch hits an internal assert in AccumulateType.cpp and asks to report a bug.
